name: Natcho Cheese Potato Slices
recipeIngredient: 1 cup grated mozzarella cheese (or a combination of cheeses)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes.
2. Line a cookie sheet with tin foil.
3. Spray the foil with non-stick spray (Pam).
4. In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes, green onions, green peppers, and chopped white onions.
5. Pour the potato mixture onto the foil-lined pan.
6. In another bowl, mix the barbecue sauce, water, garlic powder, parsley flakes, taco seasoning, and black pepper.
7. Pour the sauce mixture over the potatoes.
8. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
9. Turn the slices to ensure even cooking and bake an additional 10 minutes or so (baking time may vary depending on the thickness of the potato slices).
10. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese and mozzarella cheese over the cooked potatoes.
11. Continue baking until the cheese has melted and the edges become crispy, about 5 more minutes.
12. Let sit for 4-5 minutes before serving to allow the cheese to set slightly.
